summary: Recent updates to the image decoder functionality in Firefox have improved how the browser tracks the parent process channel used in managing image rendering tasks. This change enhances the overall performance and efficiency of the browser, specifically in how it handles images across different tabs and windows. By better managing these processes, Firefox can deliver a smoother browsing experience, which is especially important as web pages become increasingly rich in visual content. _While users may not notice a direct change, this optimization is crucial for future developments in web performance._
